---
title: "Marjory Joan Georgina Bowles"
---

## Marjory Joan Georgina Bowles

**Dates:** (1896-1979)

### Description

great-niece of CMY

### Biography

Third daughter of Henry and Alethea Bowles, she married George St. John Rands (1893-1978).

### Letters

- Letter from [1899-1900?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
